nodes.name: DoAn_web.sln
nodes.summary: Visual Studio solution file that groups the BunnyChat ASP.NET Core project with Debug and Release build configurations across multiple CPU platforms.

nodes.name: BunnyChat.csproj
nodes.summary: SDK-style .NET 8 web project manifest declaring nullable C# settings and NuGet dependencies for JWT authentication, MongoDB, BCrypt hashing, and Swagger.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Microsoft.NET.Sdk.Web with JWT Bearer, MongoDB.Driver, and Swashbuckle package references.

nodes.name: appsettings.Development.json
nodes.summary: Development-only ASP.NET Core configuration overlay tuning logging levels and Bearer authentication valid issuers and audiences for local hosts.

nodes.name: appsettings.json
nodes.summary: Primary application settings supplying MongoDB connection string, JWT issuer/audience and token lifetimes, default logging levels, and allowed hosts for the BunnyChat API.
